name: ryu
description: Drive a local Ryu Core node from Claude Code: local models, agents, workflows, RAG Spaces, and any MCP server Ryu has registered, all behind one bundled MCP bridge.

ryu_core_url.title: Ryu Core URL
ryu_core_url.description: Base URL of your running Ryu Core node. A local desktop or headless node listens on 127.0.0.1:7980.

ryu_core_token.title: Ryu Core token
ryu_core_token.description: Node-admittance bearer, only if your node requires auth. Leave blank for a local loopback node.
